overview: JAZBAA is a premium Awwwards-level platform connecting people with their creative passions — dance, music, art, fitness, tech, and more. It features a light, cinematic UI with immersive GSAP animations, smooth scroll, and 3D interactions across 5 fully-animated pages.
features: Premium light UI with cinematic typography and Apple-level spacing
GSAP + ScrollTrigger animations including text reveal, parallax, and stagger effects
Interactive 3D tilt cards for 8 passion categories
Custom Cuberto-style cursor with magnetic buttons
Glass morphism navbar with scroll-triggered blur
Horizontal Apple-style scroll gallery for events
SVG stroke draw animations for icons and connecting lines
Animated counters and community testimonial carousel
5 fully-animated pages: Home, About, Join, Events, Landing
